tier1_validation.ztw_snippet: 本路線最為輕鬆且最適合 IG，主軸落在濟州西岸的淺色沙灘、亞熱帶庭園與茶園。挾才海水浴場呈現濟州最招牌的畫面——綠松石色淺灘、貝殼碎片白沙，以及外海漂浮的飛揚島。翰林公園（與沙灘相連）是 10 萬平方公尺的園藝公園，園內含挾才與雙龍熔岩洞窟，並依時序展示山茶（冬）、鬱金香（春）、蓮花（夏）等花卉。O'sulloc 茶博物館由愛茉莉太平洋於 2001 年於茶園實地開設，吸引講究設計感的旅客造訪——茶園漫步、隔壁的 Innisfree 濟州館、與輪替的茶主題咖啡菜單（包括知名綠茶霜淇淋與蛋糕卷）。當日通常以涯月咖啡街收尾——5 公里海景咖啡與餐廳長帶，下午與黃昏正是當地節奏。司機導遊將依潮汐（沙灘）與天候（茶園）彈性調整順序。

summary.overall_assessment: Strong native-Taiwan tone overall. Tier 1 was mostly false positives — the validator under-recognized acceptable Taiwan synonyms (單日行程 for "day tour", 春櫻/秋楓 for cherry blossom/autumn foliage, 郵輪總站 for cruise terminal, 蜜柑採摘 for tangerine picking, 黑豬 in Jeju context, 百日/百大 for "100"). The translator also preserved verbatim brand strings (Visit Busan, AtoC Korea — Busan Day Tour) per guidelines. Genuine Tier 1 misses: 2 (yongdusan smartNotes.photo dropped "in Gyeongju"; lunch (jeju) description dropped 濟州 prefix on black pig). Tier 2 critical issues: 0 simplified-character leaks across the full 97-POI corpus, 0 informal 你 in 2nd-person register (51 instances of formal 您). Two confirmed glossary violations: "walking intensity" rendered as 步行強度 instead of 步行難度 (poi:hallasan_eorimok_trail, poi:route_variant_gapyeong_loop); minor overuse of 獨特 noted in poi:hallim_park description. Quality: A-/A. Most-problematic POI by issue density: poi:hallasan_eorimok_trail and poi:route_variant_gapyeong_loop (each one 步行強度 violation).
